hero.preHeadline: Tasks, projects, people, time, clients, billing —
hero.headline: Connected into one profitability engine that turns time into money
hero.sub2: every workflow runs in one place.

problem.title1: How many tools is your work
problem.desc2: Searching for where to check what becomes the work itself.

1.title: Conversation becomes execution
1.desc: Turn a customer message into a task with one click. Who asked, when, and what — the original is always linked.

2.title: Scattered work, gathered
2.desc: Chat, tasks, files, meetings, invoices. What used to live separately now moves in one flow. The time you spent jumping tools disappears.

3.title: Every agreement is recorded
3.desc: There's always an answer to "but you said earlier…". Conversations, change history, and agreements are all preserved — disputes are prevented.

features.title: Everything you need, right here.
features.desc: Each Q is its own thing — and connects into one flow.

talk.name: Q Talk
talk.desc: Customer-focused chat. Turn messages into tasks, share files, record agreements. As easy as Kakao, structured for work.

task.name: Q Task
task.desc: Tasks from chat or made by hand — all in one place. Due dates, assignees, priorities, statuses. Today's work and overdue items at a glance.

note.name: Q Note
note.desc: Live transcript and translation during meetings. Auto-detect key questions, suggest answers from materials you uploaded. Auto summary after.

file.name: Q File
file.desc: Files organized per project. "Where is that file?" goes away.

bill.name: Q Bill
bill.desc: Create and email invoices. Send, payment confirmation, overdue management — all in one place.

engine.desc1: Customer chat, tasks, and billing in one — Q Talk, Q Task, and Q Bill organize what's scattered
engine.desc2: and recover revenue you almost lost.
engine.resultSub1: Who, on which project, for how many hours, made how much.

compare.desc: All great tools. But used together, work scatters.

request.label: Customer requests
request.planq: Convert to tasks straight from chat

task.label: Task management
task.planq: Live task panel next to the chat

trust.desc: PlanQ wasn't born from theory. It was born from practice.
trust.quote: Working remotely with global clients for over 15 years, I've used Slack, Notion, Google Workspace, and Asana. I learned through years of experience that more tools means less efficiency, and that what's most needed is 'cognitively clear structure'.

finalCta.head: Stop letting work feel like a job — PlanQ
finalCta.sub: No install. Start in your browser.

featuresPage.title: Everything you need, right here.
featuresPage.sub: PlanQ ties 16 modules into one flow. No more jumping between tools.

qseries.title: The five core modules
qseries.desc: Each Q is its own thing — and connects into one flow.

talk.name: Q Talk — Customer chat
talk.lead: Easy chat with work structure built in. 1:1 customer channels + file sharing + agreement records + AI task extraction in one screen.
bullets: Dedicated 1:1 channel per customer + workspace group channels
AI extracts tasks from messages — one click into Q Task
File · image attachments (SHA-256 dedup) + auto KO/EN translation
Realtime via Socket.IO + per-user pinning + edit/delete with audit log
Two-way Project ↔ chat linking + AI candidate dedup

task.name: Q Task — Task execution
task.lead: Assign, review, complete in one flow. 7-state ENUM, 4 perspectives (assignee · reviewer · requester · observer), hours tracking.
bullets: 7 statuses (not_started → waiting → in_progress → reviewing → revision_requested → completed)
Perspective-aware labels (assignee/reviewer/requester/observer) — same task reads differently per role
Hours tracking (estimated · actual · progress%) + capacity dashboard + burndown chart
This week / All mine / Requests — three tabs separating incoming and outgoing
Confirmation workflow (all/any policy) + AI deliverable-based task naming

note.name: Q Note — Voice meetings · memos
note.lead: Deepgram live STT + auto translation + question detection + RAG answer suggestion. Auto summary when meeting ends.
bullets: Deepgram-powered live KO/EN transcription (live + review modes)
Auto question detection — RAG answer suggestions from pre-uploaded materials
Auto vocabulary extraction (verbatim from materials) — improves STT accuracy
Pre-registered speakers + post-matching (no in-meeting modals)
Two-tier model split (gpt-4.1-nano + gpt-4o-mini) for cost efficiency

file.name: Q File — Files
file.lead: Organized per project · per customer. SHA-256 dedup. Two-way Google Drive sync (workspace shared).
bullets: Folders organized by project · customer with auto categorization
SHA-256 deduplication — only one physical copy of identical files
Two-way Google Drive sync (workspace only) + native PlanQ storage (personal)
1GB / 50GB / 500GB storage and 10MB / 30MB / 50MB per file by plan
External share token links + previews

bill.name: Q Bill — Billing · payments
bill.lead: Auto sequence quote → contract → invoice → tax invoice. 4 templates (fixed/subscription/consulting/custom) + installment + multi-currency.
bullets: ProjectStage auto-progression engine — idempotent recalculation by entity state
Installment billing (invoice_installments) — per-installment payment & tax-invoice marking
5 currencies (KRW/USD/EUR/JPY/CNY) + KR + SWIFT/EN bank info shown together
Native bank-transfer billing as primary + PortOne V2 secondary
Popbill tax invoices (auto for KR businesses) + public payment page (token)

workspace.title: Unified workspace
workspace.desc: Projects, calendar, docs, and email in one workspace — naturally connected with the Q series.

project.name: Q Project — Project workbench
project.lead: Conversations, tasks, notes, issues, and files unified per project. Auto progress + transaction sequence.
bullets: Per-project unified workbench (chat · tasks · notes · issues · files)
Project members + clients managed together
Transaction sequence — 4 templates auto-progressing through quote/contract/invoice/tax
Kanban process + auto progress calculation

calendar.name: Q Calendar — Schedule
calendar.lead: Workspace and personal calendars separated. Task deadlines auto-displayed + Google Meet rooms.
bullets: Events + attendees (workspace members / external guests)
Q Task deadlines auto-displayed (assignee + created_by)
Google Meet rooms auto-generated + link sharing
Workspace / Mine — two views with conflict detection

docs.name: Q docs — Documents · signatures
docs.lead: Create and manage contracts, quotes, SOWs, proposals. OTP-based external signing + expiry + audit log.
bullets: Documents (post / document) + templates + revisions
External signing (OTP hash + expiry + IP audit)
Public document pages (token-based) — accessible without login
Received signature inbox + Brief AI document organization tool

mail.name: Q Mail — Email integration
mail.lead: Workspace email in one place. Connected to the email channel of the notification matrix.
bullets: Member-only menu — unified customer email handling
Auto-linked to email channel of the notification matrix
Per-workspace mail-from-name / mail-reply-to settings
Audit log + auto tracking of send failures (EmailLog)

ai.title: AI works, data speaks
ai.desc: Cue (AI teammate) · Insights (profitability dashboard) · Notification Matrix make PlanQ smarter.

cue.label: AI TEAMMATE
cue.name: Cue — Autonomous AI teammate
cue.lead: Not just automation — a teammate you can hand off to. Same capability across all plans, with monthly action limits as the only difference.
bullets: Task extraction (messages → Q Task) + answer generation (Q Note)
Meeting summary · vocabulary extraction · STT correction (auto-learning)
Action limits per plan (Free 0 / Basic 100 / Pro 500)
Global help drawer (⌘?) + cue:ask event receiver

insights.label: ANALYTICS
insights.name: Insights — Profitability dashboard
insights.lead: 7 tabs — revenue · cost · profit · time · customers · forecast. AI insight box (observe → diagnose → prescribe).
bullets: Revenue / Cost / Profit / Time / Customers / Projects / Forecast — 7 tabs
Tasks & Time tab — Estimated vs AI vs Actual three-way comparison ★
AI insight box — three layers (Observe → Diagnose → Prescribe)
Per-project progress + workspace-wide capacity chart

notifications.label: NOTIFICATIONS
notifications.name: 4-channel notification matrix
notifications.lead: 7 events × 3 channels = 21 toggles. Inbox · in-app · device · email — 4 channels with inbox unified.
bullets: Inbox (permanent) · in-app toaster · device push · email — 4 channels
7 event kinds × 3 channels = 21-toggle matrix (notification_prefs)
In-app toaster — top right, no focus steal, context-aware
PWA Web Push (per user + browser) + dismissible inbox banner when push is off

foundation.title: Trustworthy foundation
foundation.desc: Korea-hosted, multi-tenant isolated, multilingual, with external integrations. Built to operational standards from day one.

security.name: Security · multi-tenant
security.lead: JWT (Access 15min + Refresh 7d) · enforced WHERE business_id isolation · audit log · Helmet · CORS · rate limits · SSRF protection.

i18n.name: Multilingual (KO · EN)
i18n.lead: Per-user language settings · all UI strings i18n-separated · per-member language overrides in workspaces.

gdrive.name: Google Drive sync
gdrive.lead: Workspace shared files → Drive · personal files → PlanQ native. Option B+1 policy (one-way).

billing.name: PortOne · Popbill billing
billing.lead: Bank-transfer first + PortOne V2 second + Popbill tax invoices integrated. 4-stage cron (overdue / recurring / report).

pricingPage.sub: 14 days free, no credit card. Cancel anytime.

starter.name: Starter
features: Q Talk · Q Task · Q File · Q Bill basics

items.name: Extra members
items.desc: When you exceed Basic's 5-seat limit. Add per-seat as needed.

items.name: Extra storage
items.desc: Expand Q File capacity in 10GB blocks.

items.name: More Cue actions
items.desc: When you go past your monthly AI extraction / summary / answer limit.

cancel.a: Yes. After cancellation your data is preserved for 30 days, so if you resume in that window everything continues. Try 14 days free with no credit card before deciding.

team.q: How many teammates can I invite?
team.a: Free is 1 person, Basic up to 5, Pro unlimited. You can add seats per-person as Addons.

data.q: Can I bring my existing Kakao or email data?
data.a: Customer info and contacts can be imported via CSV. Chat history starts fresh inside PlanQ — upload prior materials to Q File and they stay searchable and linked.

addon.a: Addons can only be added on top of Basic or Pro. Member, storage, and Cue action add-ons are settled by usage and billed together on your next billing date.

enterprise.q: Is there an enterprise plan for larger teams?
enterprise.a: Yes. For 50+ teams or those needing SSO/SAML/dedicated instances, we handle it via custom agreement. Reach out via /contact.

cta.title: Start your 14-day free trial
cta.sub: No credit card to sign up. Pay only when you decide.

aboutPage.sub: PlanQ wasn't born from theory. It was born from practice.
aboutPage.quote: Working remotely with global clients for over 15 years, I've used Slack, Notion, Google Workspace, and Asana. I learned through years of experience that more tools means less efficiency, and that what's most needed is 'cognitively clear structure'.

mission.title: Work, just work.
mission.desc: People should focus on work — not on managing tools. PlanQ pulls scattered work back together so the tools fade and only the work remains.

simplicity.name: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: We don't pile on features — we organize the flow of work. We know that removing things from a screen is harder than adding them.

execution.name: Execution-first
execution.desc: Plenty of tools just plan. PlanQ is for actually making conversations, tasks, and invoices happen.

evidence.name: Evidence-based
evidence.desc: Every agreement leaves a trail. There's an answer when disputes come up, and data when the next decision needs to be made.

items.label: Remote collaboration begins
items.desc: Working with global clients on Slack, Notion, and Asana — and starting to feel where each tool falls short.

items.label: PlanQ takes shape
items.desc: Defined PlanQ's information architecture to fix the inefficiency of scattered tools. Set the principle: "each customer's scattered context, gathered."

items.label: Beta release
items.desc: Beta of 5 modules — Q Talk · Q Task · Q Note · Q File · Q Bill. Korean and English supported.

items.label: General availability
items.desc: Profitability Engine officially introduced. PortOne native billing, installments, multi-currency, and unified notification matrix shipped.

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.sub: Sales, support, partnerships — anything goes. We reply within 24 hours.
